form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (16.87) when seventh over 300m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Has four wins and five placings from 14 starts from the draw. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on March 1 over 300m at this track behind Dewana Star beaten 7 lengths (16.72) in a Special conditions race. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming from a five months spell and worth noting was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring in 25.27 over 450m at Warrnambool. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.4 lengths at Shepparton over 390m (22.21) beating Paw Uma in Grade 5 on April 6. Others read better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Faltered on first turn and tailed off.

form.formComment: Comes to this track for the first time. Comes off an average run last start over 366m at Capalaba when fifth behind Black Raspberry (20.11) in Grade 5. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a head over 390m at Shepparton in a handy (22.65), beating Bull Durham. Will find this a bit tougher, good win last start but looks tested in this difficult assignment.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Ballarat but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Has to overcome a wide draw and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 5.5 lengths over 300m at this track in a handy 16.94, beating Permit Fee. The form from the last run stacks up well. Worth including.
